title: zieria smithii var. typica
intro: Zieria smithii var. typica, also known as the 'Native Mock Orange' or 'Native Wild Orange', is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in Australian indigenous medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Zieria smithii var. typica include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to alleviate fever and reduce pain. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices for its medicinal uses.
